ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination city of the flight */,
  "destination_airport_iata" TEXT /* IATA code of the destination airport */,
  "flight_no" TEXT /* Flight number assigned to the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft assigned to the flight */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin city of the flight */,
  "origin_airport_iata" TEXT /* IATA code of the origin airport */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight was added to the schedule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight ID */,
  "sunday" TEXT /* Availability on Sunday (e.g., x for available, None for not available) */,
  "monday" TEXT /* Availability on Monday */,
  "tuesday" TEXT /* Availability on Tuesday */,
  "wednesday" TEXT /* Availability on Wednesday */,
  "thursday" TEXT /* Availability on Thursday */,
  "friday" TEXT /* Availability on Friday */,
  "saturday" TEXT /* Availability on Saturday */,
  "flight_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedule_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airport was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airport details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline that owns the aircraft */,
  "manufacture_year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the aircraft was added to the fleet */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the aircraft details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircrafts_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airline_management ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., pilot, flight attendant) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the crew member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member was hired */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crew member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crew member details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight being booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer is a loyalty program member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking associated with the reservation */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Assigned seat number for the booking */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., economy, business) */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight ID */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed) */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time in case of delays */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "reason_for_delay" TEXT /* Reason for any delay */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status update was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airline_management" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Total number of aircraft in the fleet */,
  "annual_revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the airline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airline was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airline details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew assignment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight assigned */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crew member assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "flight_role" TEXT /* Specific role of the crew member on the flight (e.g., captain, first officer, flight attendant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
